text:
I've attached my poudriere build log. The resulting package runs and is able to collect and analyze IQ samples from an rtl-sdr.

`portlint -AC` output:

WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTEPOCH.
WARN: Consider to set DEVELOPER=yes in /etc/make.conf
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.
